all.en: Subject: Important Update — Lost and Found Office Relocation
all.zh: 主旨：重要通知 — 失物招領辦公室搬遷

all.en: Dear all,
all.zh: 各位同仁好，

all.en: The Administrative Department wishes to share an important update.
all.zh: 行政部在此分享一項重要更新。

all.en: Our Lost and Found office will move to a new location next week.
all.zh: 失物招領辦公室將於下週搬遷至新位置。

all.en: The new office is located on the second floor near the elevators.
all.zh: 新辦公室位於二樓電梯口附近。

all.en: It replaces the previous location in the basement hallway.
all.zh: 原本位於地下室走廊的位置已不再使用。

all.en: The new space is larger, brighter, and more accessible.
all.zh: 新空間更為寬敞、明亮且方便進出。

all.en: The official relocation date is Monday, June 9th.
all.zh: 正式搬遷日為 6 月 9 日星期一。

all.en: Operating hours remain unchanged after the move.
all.zh: 搬遷後營運時間維持不變。

all.en: The office is open from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. on weekdays.
all.zh: 辦公室於平日上午九點至下午五點開放。

all.en: It is closed during the lunch hour from noon to one.
all.zh: 中午十二點至一點為休息時間。

all.en: Please plan your visits accordingly to avoid delays.
all.zh: 請依此規劃訪問時間，以免延誤。

all.en: Items can also be reported through the online portal.
all.zh: 亦可透過線上系統回報遺失物品。

all.en: The portal includes a searchable database of recent finds.
all.zh: 系統內含近期拾獲物品的可搜尋資料庫。

all.en: Photos are uploaded within twenty-four hours of receipt.
all.zh: 拾獲後二十四小時內上傳物品照片。

all.en: If you spot your item, simply book a pickup time online.
all.zh: 若發現您的物品，可直接於線上預約領取時段。

all.en: The new pickup process requires valid employee identification.
all.zh: 新的領取流程需出示有效員工識別證。

all.en: You must also briefly describe distinguishing features of the item.
all.zh: 您也需簡要描述物品的辨識特徵。

all.en: This step helps prevent items from being collected by mistake.
all.zh: 此步驟可避免物品遭誤領。

all.en: For high-value items, additional proof of ownership may be required.
all.zh: 高價值物品可能需提供額外的所有權證明。

all.en: Examples include receipts, photographs, or serial numbers.
all.zh: 例如收據、照片或序號。

all.en: Our staff will verify your information before releasing any items.
all.zh: 工作人員將先核對資訊，再將物品交付。

all.en: Please bring your own bag for transporting larger items.
all.zh: 請自備袋子以方便攜帶較大物品。

all.en: We no longer provide disposable plastic bags at the counter.
all.zh: 我們不再於櫃台提供一次性塑膠袋。

all.en: This change supports our commitment to sustainability.
all.zh: 此項調整呼應公司的永續發展承諾。

all.en: All unclaimed items are stored for a maximum of sixty days.
all.zh: 所有未領取物品最長保存六十天。

all.en: After that, items are donated to local charities or recycled.
all.zh: 期滿後將捐贈至當地慈善機構或回收處理。

all.en: Perishable items will be disposed of within twenty-four hours.
all.zh: 易腐物品將於二十四小時內處理掉。

all.en: Personal electronics are stored in a locked cabinet for safety.
all.zh: 個人電子產品將存放於上鎖的櫃子以策安全。

all.en: Wallets, keys, and ID cards receive priority storage.
all.zh: 錢包、鑰匙與識別證享有優先保存待遇。

all.en: Our staff will attempt to contact owners directly when possible.
all.zh: 若可行，工作人員將主動聯絡物品所有人。

all.en: Please ensure your contact details in the system are up to date.
all.zh: 請確認系統中的聯絡資訊為最新。

all.en: Outdated information makes returns significantly more difficult.
all.zh: 過時資訊將大幅增加歸還難度。

all.en: If you find an item, please drop it off at the new counter.
all.zh: 如撿到物品，請送交新辦公室櫃台。

all.en: A drop-off slot is also available outside business hours.
all.zh: 非上班時間亦設有投遞口可使用。

all.en: Please attach a short note describing where you found the item.
all.zh: 請附上簡短紙條註明拾獲地點。

all.en: This information helps us match items to potential owners.
all.zh: 此資訊有助於我們媒合物品與可能的失主。

all.en: We deeply appreciate the honesty of our colleagues.
all.zh: 我們由衷感謝同仁們的誠實表現。

all.en: Last year, we successfully returned over three hundred items.
all.zh: 去年我們成功歸還超過三百件物品。

all.en: Thank you for helping create a trustworthy office culture.
all.zh: 感謝您協助建立值得信賴的辦公文化。

all.en: For umbrella loans, a separate self-service rack is available.
all.zh: 雨傘借用設有獨立的自助借用架。

all.en: Please return borrowed umbrellas within three business days.
all.zh: 請於三個工作天內歸還借出的雨傘。

all.en: Repeated non-returns may affect future borrowing privileges.
all.zh: 多次未歸還可能影響未來借用權益。

all.en: A weekly summary of new finds will be posted in the bulletin.
all.zh: 每週新拾獲物品摘要將公告於佈告欄。

all.en: Photos will also be shared in the office chat channel.
all.zh: 照片亦會分享於辦公室聊天頻道。

all.en: Please check both regularly if you have misplaced something.
all.zh: 如有遺失物品請定期查看兩處資訊。

all.en: Our staff is available to answer questions during open hours.
all.zh: 工作人員於開放時間可解答相關問題。

all.en: You may also email the dedicated lost-and-found inbox anytime.
all.zh: 您也可隨時寫信至失物招領專用信箱。

all.en: Responses are typically provided within one business day.
all.zh: 我們通常於一個工作天內回覆。

all.en: We hope the new location makes the service easier to use.
all.zh: 我們希望新地點能讓服務更便於使用。

all.en: Improvements were based directly on employee feedback.
all.zh: 改善內容直接根據員工回饋意見規劃。

all.en: We will continue to refine our processes over time.
all.zh: 我們將持續優化相關流程。

all.en: Thank you for your attention to this notice.
all.zh: 感謝您留意本通知。

all.en: Sincerely,
all.zh: 敬上，

all.en: Administrative Department
all.zh: 行政部
